---
name: portfolio-setup
description: "Use when: setting up portfolio project structure, initializing components, organizing project files, or managing portfolio assets. Helps streamline portfolio development workflow."
---

# Portfolio Setup Skill

This skill provides workflows for initializing and managing your portfolio project.

## Available Workflows

### 1. Project Structure Setup
- Initialize folder organization
- Create component directories
- Set up asset management

### 2. Component Generation
- Generate React component boilerplate
- Create styled component files
- Set up component documentation

### 3. Asset Organization
- Organize project cover images
- Manage portfolio assets
- Structure static files

### 4. Project Configuration
- Configure build settings
- Set up development environment
- Validate project setup

## Usage

Invoke this skill when you need to:
- Set up new project sections in your portfolio
- Create reusable component templates
- Organize project files and assets
- Initialize new portfolio features

## Common Tasks

**Set up a new project section:**
- Define section structure
- Create necessary components
- Organize related assets

**Create new components:**
- Generate component files
- Add styling
- Document component usage

**Manage portfolio assets:**
- Organize images and files
- Maintain asset directory structure
- Reference assets properly
